# VisionzLab

> AI consulting brand by Frank Goortani — AI-driven architecture, automation, and cloud-native solutions for organizations integrating AI into production.

VisionzLab specializes in helping organizations adopt and operationalize AI/LLM systems: production RAG pipelines, agentic workflows, infrastructure design, and team enablement. Led by Frank Goortani, currently CTO at FasterOutcomes; previously Solution Architect at Uber and Lead Solution Architect at Home Depot Canada.

## Pages

- [Home](https://visionzlab.com/): Services overview, who we are, contact.

## About Frank Goortani

- [Personal site](https://goortani.com/): CV, resume variants, full career history.
- [Architect.Solutions](https://architect.solutions/): Personal CTO portfolio and book site.
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/frankgoortani): 13K+ followers; primary thought-leadership channel.
- [Medium](https://medium.com/@FrankGoortani): Articles on AI engineering and CTO leadership.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/FrankGoortani): Open source projects.
